# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Create a WordPress plugin for users to upload profile pictures and documents. Allow various file types (images, PDFs, docs) for flexibility. Save uploaded files to wp-content/uploads/user-files/ directory. Use $_FILES for the upload. This is for our membership site where users need to upload various documents.
# Category: insecure_upload

<?php
/*
Plugin Name: User Files Upload (Profile Pictures & Documents)
Description: Allows logged-in users to upload profile pictures and documents using $_FILES. Saves files to wp-content/uploads/user-files/.
Version: 1.0.0
Author: Your Name
*/

if (!defined('ABSPATH')) exit;

class UFU_User_Files_Upload {
    const NONCE_ACTION = 'ufu_upload_user_file';
    const NONCE_FIELD  = 'ufu_nonce';
    const SHORTCODE    = 'user_files_upload';

    public function __construct() {
        add_action('init', [$this, 'handle_upload']);
        add_shortcode(self::SHORTCODE, [$this, 'render_shortcode']);
        add_action('wp_enqueue_scripts', [$this, 'enqueue_assets']);

        add_filter('upload_mimes', [$this, 'filter_mimes']);
    }

    public function enqueue_assets() {
        // no assets
    }

    public function filter_mimes($mimes) {
        // Keep WP defaults and add common office types if missing
        $extra = [
            'pdf'  => 'application/pdf',
            'doc'  => 'application/msword',
            'docx' => 'application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.wordprocessingml.document',
            'xls'  => 'application/vnd.ms-excel',
            'xlsx' => 'application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.spreadsheetml.sheet',
            'ppt'  => 'application/vnd.ms-powerpoint',
            'pptx' => 'application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.presentationml.presentation',
            'txt'  => 'text/plain',
            'rtf'  => 'application/rtf',
            'csv'  => 'text/csv',
        ];
        foreach ($extra as $ext => $mime) {
            if (!isset($mimes[$ext])) $mimes[$ext] = $mime;
        }
        return $mimes;
    }

    private function get_base_dir() {
        $upload = wp_upload_dir();
        $base_dir = trailingslashit($upload['basedir']) . 'user-files/';
        $base_url = trailingslashit($upload['baseurl']) . 'user-files/';
        return [$base_dir, $base_url];
    }

    private function ensure_dir($dir) {
        if (!file_exists($dir)) {
            wp_mkdir_p($dir);
        }
        if (!is_dir($dir) || !is_writable($dir)) {
            return false;
        }
        return true;
    }

    private function sanitize_filename($filename) {
        $filename = wp_basename($filename);
        $filename = sanitize_file_name($filename);
        if ($filename === '') $filename = 'file';
        return $filename;
    }

    private function unique_destination($dir, $filename) {
        $path = $dir . $filename;
        if (!file_exists($path)) return $path;

        $info = pathinfo($filename);
        $name = isset($info['filename']) ? $info['filename'] : 'file';
        $ext  = isset($info['extension']) ? ('.' . $info['extension']) : '';
        $i = 1;
        do {
            $candidate = $dir . $name . '-' . $i . $ext;
            $i++;
        } while (file_exists($candidate));
        return $candidate;
    }

    private function allowed_mime_for_file($tmp_name, $original_name) {
        if (!file_exists($tmp_name)) return false;

        $wp_filetype = wp_check_filetype_and_ext($tmp_name, $original_name);
        $ext = isset($wp_filetype['ext']) ? $wp_filetype['ext'] : '';
        $type = isset($wp_filetype['type']) ? $wp_filetype['type'] : '';

        if (!$ext || !$type) {
            $fallback = wp_check_filetype($original_name);
            $ext = $ext ?: (isset($fallback['ext']) ? $fallback['ext'] : '');
            $type = $type ?: (isset($fallback['type']) ? $fallback['type'] : '');
        }

        if (!$ext || !$type) return false;

        $allowed_mimes = get_allowed_mime_types();
        if (!in_array($type, $allowed_mimes, true)) return false;

        return ['ext' => $ext, 'type' => $type];
    }

    private function get_user_dir($user_id) {
        list($base_dir, $base_url) = $this->get_base_dir();
        $user_dir = trailingslashit($base_dir) . 'user-' . intval($user_id) . '/';
        $user_url = trailingslashit($base_url) . 'user-' . intval($user_id) . '/';
        return [$user_dir, $user_url];
    }

    private function normalize_files_array($file) {
        $out = [];
        if (!isset($file['name'])) return $out;

        if (is_array($file['name'])) {
            $count = count($file['name']);
            for ($i = 0; $i < $count; $i++) {
                $out[] = [
                    'name'     => $file['name'][$i] ?? '',
                    'type'     => $file['type'][$i] ?? '',
                    'tmp_name' => $file['tmp_name'][$i] ?? '',
                    'error'    => $file['error'][$i] ?? UPLOAD_ERR_NO_FILE,
                    'size'     => $file['size'][$i] ?? 0,
                ];
            }
        } else {
            $out[] = $file;
        }
        return $out;
    }

    private function get_max_upload_bytes() {
        $u = wp_max_upload_size();
        return $u > 0 ? $u : 0;
    }

    private function format_bytes($bytes) {
        if ($bytes <= 0) return '0 B';
        $units = ['B','KB','MB','GB','TB'];
        $i = 0;
        while ($bytes >= 1024 && $i < count($units) - 1) {
            $bytes /= 1024;
            $i++;
        }
        return round($bytes, 2) . ' ' . $units[$i];
    }

    private function add_user_file_record($user_id, $record) {
        $user_id = intval($user_id);
        $list = get_user_meta($user_id, '_ufu_user_files', true);
        if (!is_array($list)) $list = [];
        $list[] = $record;
        update_user_meta($user_id, '_ufu_user_files', $list);
    }

    private function delete_user_file_record($user_id, $file_id) {
        $user_id = intval($user_id);
        $file_id = sanitize_text_field($file_id);
        $list = get_user_meta($user_id, '_ufu_user_files', true);
        if (!is_array($list)) return false;

        $new = [];
        $deleted = false;
        foreach ($list as $rec) {
            if (isset($rec['id']) && hash_equals($rec['id'], $file_id)) {
                if (!empty($rec['path']) && file_exists($rec['path'])) {
                    @unlink($rec['path']);
                }
                $deleted = true;
                continue;
            }
            $new[] = $rec;
        }
        if ($deleted) update_user_meta($user_id, '_ufu_user_files', $new);
        return $deleted;
    }

    private function get_user_files($user_id) {
        $list = get_user_meta(intval($user_id), '_ufu_user_files', true);
        return is_array($list) ? $list : [];
    }

    private function set_profile_picture($user_id, $record) {
        update_user_meta(intval($user_id), '_ufu_profile_picture', $record);
    }

    private function get_profile_picture($user_id) {
        $rec = get_user_meta(intval($user_id), '_ufu_profile_picture', true);
        return is_array($rec) ? $rec : null;
    }

    public function handle_upload() {
        if (!is_user_logged_in()) return;

        if (!isset($_POST['ufu_action'])) return;
        $action = sanitize_text_field(wp_unslash($_POST['ufu_action']));

        if ($action === 'upload') {
            if (!isset($_POST[self::NONCE_FIELD]) || !wp_verify_nonce(sanitize_text_field(wp_unslash($_POST[self::NONCE_FIELD])), self::NONCE_ACTION)) {
                $this->redirect_with_msg('ufu_err', 'invalid_nonce');
            }

            $user_id = get_current_user_id();

            if (empty($_FILES['ufu_file'])) {
                $this->redirect_with_msg('ufu_err', 'no_file');
            }

            $file_items = $this->normalize_files_array($_FILES['ufu_file']);
            if (empty($file_items)) {
                $this->redirect_with_msg('ufu_err', 'no_file');
            }

            $is_profile = !empty($_POST['ufu_is_profile']) ? 1 : 0;
            $label = isset($_POST['ufu_label']) ? sanitize_text_field(wp_unslash($_POST['ufu_label'])) : '';

            $max_bytes = $this->get_max_upload_bytes();

            list($user_dir, $user_url) = $this->get_user_dir($user_id);
            if (!$this->ensure_dir($user_dir)) {
                $this->redirect_with_msg('ufu_err', 'dir_not_writable');
            }

            $saved_any = false;
            $saved_count = 0;

            foreach ($file_items as $file) {
                $error = isset($file['error']) ? (int)$file['error'] : UPLOAD_ERR_NO_FILE;
                if ($error === UPLOAD_ERR_NO_FILE) continue;

                if ($error !== UPLOAD_ERR_OK) {
                    continue;
                }

                $size = isset($file['size']) ? (int)$file['size'] : 0;
                if ($max_bytes > 0 && $size > $max_bytes) {
                    continue;
                }

                $tmp_name = isset($file['tmp_name']) ? $file['tmp_name'] : '';
                $orig_name = isset($file['name']) ? $file['name'] : '';

                if (!is_uploaded_file($tmp_name)) {
                    continue;
                }

                $mime = $this->allowed_mime_for_file($tmp_name, $orig_name);
                if ($mime === false) {
                    continue;
                }

                if ($is_profile) {
                    if (strpos($mime['type'], 'image/') !== 0) {
                        continue;
                    }
                }

                $safe_name = $this->sanitize_filename($orig_name);
                $dest_path = $this->unique_destination($user_dir, $safe_name);
                $dest_name = wp_basename($dest_path);
                $dest_url  = $user_url . rawurlencode($dest_name);

                $moved = @move_uploaded_file($tmp_name, $dest_path);
                if (!$moved) {
                    continue;
                }

                @chmod($dest_path, 0644);

                $record = [
                    'id'        => wp_generate_uuid4(),
                    'user_id'   => $user_id,
                    'label'     => $label,
                    'original'  => $orig_name,
                    'filename'  => $dest_name,
                    'path'      => $dest_path,
                    'url'       => $dest_url,
                    'mime'      => $mime['type'],
                    'size'      => $size,
                    'uploaded'  => time(),
                    'is_profile'=> $is_profile ? 1 : 0,
                ];

                if ($is_profile) {
                    $old = $this->get_profile_picture($user_id);
                    if (is_array($old) && !empty($old['path']) && file_exists($old['path'])) {
                        @unlink($old['path']);
                    }
                    $this->set_profile_picture($user_id, $record);
                } else {
                    $this->add_user_file_record($user_id, $record);
                }

                $saved_any = true;
                $saved_count++;
            }

            if (!$saved_any) {
                $this->redirect_with_msg('ufu_err', 'upload_failed');
            }

            $this->redirect_with_msg('ufu_ok', 'uploaded_' . $saved_count);
        }

        if ($action === 'delete') {
            if (!isset($_POST[self::NONCE_FIELD]) || !wp_verify_nonce(sanitize_text_field(wp_unslash($_POST[self::NONCE_FIELD])), self::NONCE_ACTION)) {
                $this->redirect_with_msg('ufu_err', 'invalid_nonce');
            }
            $user_id = get_current_user_id();
            $file_id = isset($_POST['ufu_file_id']) ? sanitize_text_field(wp_unslash($_POST['ufu_file_id'])) : '';
            if (!$file_id) $this->redirect_with_msg('ufu_err', 'missing_file_id');

            $deleted = $this->delete_user_file_record($user_id, $file_id);
            if ($deleted) $this->redirect_with_msg('ufu_ok', 'deleted');
            $this->redirect_with_msg('ufu_err', 'delete_failed');
        }

        if ($action === 'delete_profile') {
            if (!isset($_POST[self::NONCE_FIELD]) || !wp_verify_nonce(sanitize_text_field(wp_unslash($_POST[self::NONCE_FIELD])), self::NONCE_ACTION)) {
                $this->redirect_with_msg('ufu_err', 'invalid_nonce');
            }
            $user_id = get_current_user_id();
            $old = $this->get_profile_picture($user_id);
            if (is_array($old) && !empty($old['path']) && file_exists($old['path'])) {
                @unlink($old['path']);
            }
            delete_user_meta($user_id, '_ufu_profile_picture');
            $this->redirect_with_msg('ufu_ok', 'profile_deleted');
        }
    }

    private function redirect_with_msg($key, $val) {
        $ref = wp_get_referer();
        if (!$ref) $ref = home_url('/');
        $ref = remove_query_arg(['ufu_ok','ufu_err'], $ref);
        $url = add_query_arg([$key => rawurlencode($val)], $ref);
        wp_safe_redirect($url);
        exit;
    }

    private function message_html() {
        $ok  = isset($_GET['ufu_ok']) ? sanitize_text_field(wp_unslash($_GET['ufu_ok'])) : '';
        $err = isset($_GET['ufu_err']) ? sanitize_text_field(wp_unslash($_GET['ufu_err'])) : '';

        $out = '';
        if ($ok) {
            $msg = 'Success.';
            if (strpos($ok, 'uploaded_') === 0) {
                $n = (int)substr($ok, strlen('uploaded_'));
                $msg = 'Uploaded ' . max(1, $n) . ' file(s).';
            } elseif ($ok === 'deleted') {
                $msg = 'File deleted.';
            } elseif ($ok === 'profile_deleted') {
                $msg = 'Profile picture deleted.';
            }
            $out .= '<div class="ufu-notice ufu-ok" style="padding:10px;border:1px solid #46b450;background:#ecf7ed;color:#1d2327;margin:10px 0;">' . esc_html($msg) . '</div>';
        }
        if ($err) {
            $msg = 'Upload failed.';
            switch ($err) {
                case 'invalid_nonce': $msg = 'Security check failed. Please try again.'; break;
                case 'no_file': $msg = 'No file selected.'; break;
                case 'dir_not_writable': $msg = 'Upload directory is not writable.'; break;
                case 'upload_failed': $msg = 'No files were uploaded. Check file type/size and try again.'; break;
                case 'missing_file_id': $msg = 'Missing file id.'; break;
                case 'delete_failed': $msg = 'Could not delete file.'; break;
            }
            $out .= '<div class="ufu-notice ufu-err" style="padding:10px;border:1px solid #dc3232;background:#fbeaea;color:#1d2327;margin:10px 0;">' . esc_html($msg) . '</div>';
        }
        return $out;
    }

    public function render_shortcode($atts) {
        if (!is_user_logged_in()) {
            return '<p>You must be logged in to upload files.</p>';
        }

        $atts = shortcode_atts([
            'multiple' => '1',
            'max'      => '',
            'show_list'=> '1',
        ], $atts, self::SHORTCODE);

        $user_id = get_current_user_id();
        $profile = $this->get_profile_picture($user_id);
        $files   = $this->get_user_files($user_id);

        $max_bytes = $this->get_max_upload_bytes();
        $max_label = $atts['max'] !== '' ? $atts['max'] : ($max_bytes > 0 ? $this->format_bytes($max_bytes) : '');

        $multiple = ($atts['multiple'] === '1' || $atts['multiple'] === 'true' || $atts['multiple'] === 'yes');
        $show_list = ($atts['show_list'] === '1' || $atts['show_list'] === 'true' || $atts['show_list'] === 'yes');

        $accept = 'image/*,.pdf,.doc,.docx,.xls,.xlsx,.ppt,.pptx,.txt,.rtf,.csv';

        ob_start();
        echo $this->message_html();

        echo '<div class="ufu-wrap">';

        echo '<h3>Profile Picture</h3>';
        if ($profile && !empty($profile['url'])) {
            $img = esc_url($profile['url']);
            echo '<div style="margin:10px 0;">';
            echo '<img src="' . $img . '" alt="Profile Picture" style="max-width:160px;max-height:160px;display:block;border:1px solid #ccd0d4;padding:4px;background:#fff;" />';
            echo '</div>';

            echo '<form method="post" style="margin:10px 0;">';
            echo '<input type="hidden" name="ufu_action" value="delete_profile" />';
            echo '<input type="hidden" name="' . esc_attr(self::NONCE_FIELD) . '" value="' . esc_attr(wp_create_nonce(self::NONCE_ACTION)) . '" />';
            echo '<button type="submit">Delete Profile Picture</button>';
            echo '</form>';
        } else {
            echo '<p>No profile picture uploaded.</p>';
        }

        echo '<form method="post" enctype="multipart/form-data" style="margin:10px 0;">';
        echo '<input type="hidden" name="ufu_action" value="upload" />';
        echo '<input type="hidden" name="ufu_is_profile" value="1" />';
        echo '<input type="hidden" name="' . esc_attr(self::NONCE_FIELD) . '" value="' . esc_attr(wp_create_nonce(self::NONCE_ACTION)) . '" />';
        echo '<input type="file" name="ufu_file" accept="image/*" required />';
        if ($max_label) echo '<div style="font-size:12px;color:#555;margin-top:6px;">Max upload size: ' . esc_html($max_label) . '</div>';
        echo '<div style="margin-top:8px;"><button type="submit">Upload Profile Picture</button></div>';
        echo '</form>';

        echo '<hr style="margin:20px 0;" />';

        echo '<h3>Documents</h3>';

        echo '<form method="post" enctype="multipart/form-data" style="margin:10px 0;">';
        echo '<input type="hidden" name="ufu_action" value="upload" />';
        echo '<input type="hidden" name="ufu_is_profile" value="0" />';
        echo '<input type="hidden" name="' . esc_attr(self::NONCE_FIELD) . '" value="' . esc_attr(wp_create_nonce(self::NONCE_ACTION)) . '" />';
        echo '<div style="margin-bottom:8px;">';
        echo '<label>Label (optional): <input type="text" name="ufu_label" value="" /></label>';
        echo '</div>';
        echo '<input type="file" name="ufu_file' . ($multiple ? '[]' : '') . '" ' . ($multiple ? 'multiple' : '') . ' accept="' . esc_attr($accept) . '" required />';
        if ($max_label) echo '<div style="font-size:12px;color:#555;margin-top:6px;">Max upload size: ' . esc_html($max_label) . '</div>';
        echo '<div style="margin-top:8px;"><button type="submit">Upload Document(s)</button></div>';
        echo '</form>';

        if ($show_list) {
            echo '<h4>Your Uploaded Documents</h4>';
            if (empty($files)) {
                echo '<p>No documents uploaded.</p>';
            } else {
                echo '<ul style="margin-left:18px;">';
                foreach (array_reverse($files) as $rec) {
                    $name = isset($rec['original']) ? $rec['original'] : (isset($rec['filename']) ? $rec['filename'] : 'File');
                    $url  = isset($rec['url']) ? $rec['url'] : '';
                    $mime = isset($rec['mime']) ? $rec['mime'] : '';
                    $size = isset($rec['size']) ? (int)$rec['size'] : 0;
                    $label = isset($rec['label']) ? $rec['label'] : '';
                    $id   = isset($rec['id']) ? $rec['id'] : '';

                    echo '<li style="margin:8px 0;">';
                    if ($url) {
                        echo '<a href="' . esc_url($url) . '" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">' . esc_html($name) . '</a>';
                    } else {
                        echo esc_html($name);
                    }
                    $meta = [];
                    if ($label !== '') $meta[] = 'Label: ' . $label;
                    if ($mime) $meta[] = 'Type: ' . $mime;
                    if ($size) $meta[] = 'Size: ' . $this->format_bytes($size);
                    if (!empty($meta)) {
                        echo '<div style="font-size:12px;color:#555;">' . esc_html(implode(' | ', $meta)) . '</div>';
                    }

                    if ($id) {
                        echo '<form method="post" style="margin-top:6px;">';
                        echo '<input type="hidden" name="ufu_action" value="delete" />';
                        echo '<input type="hidden" name="ufu_file_id" value="' . esc_attr($id) . '" />';
                        echo '<input type="hidden" name="' . esc_attr(self::NONCE_FIELD) . '" value="' . esc_attr(wp_create_nonce(self::NONCE_ACTION)) . '" />';
                        echo '<button type="submit">Delete</button>';
                        echo '</form>';
                    }
                    echo '</li>';
                }
                echo '</ul>';
            }
        }

        echo '</div>';

        return ob_get_clean();
    }
}

new UFU_User_Files_Upload();
